global_style.style_medium: premium Japanese anime mobile game concept art, clean line art, polished cel shading with soft painterly highlights
global_style.palette: deep indigo #182033, crown gold #D8A84E, parchment #E7D4A2, jewel teal #40C2B8, wine red #8B2F45
global_style.constraints: consistent medieval fantasy auction world, elegant but readable, no modern objects, no sci-fi neon, no text, no watermark, no logo, no explicit or suggestive design

skill.name: 王庭宣价
skill.short_effect: 每局1次，本轮首次有效加价可少1个加价步进入场，但不能低于起拍价。

characters.prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: square game character portrait, 1024x1024
Primary request: medieval fantasy anime beautiful young female warrior for an auction strategy game
Subject: Aria Lionheart, royal guard warrior girl, honey-gold hair, clear blue eyes, confident warm smile, elegant white-silver light armor, red short cape, lion crest shoulder guard, small crown-shaped brooch
Scene/backdrop: blurred royal auction hall with banners and warm crown-gold light
Composition/framing: bust portrait, head and shoulders, face clear, centered, safe margins for circular avatar crop
Lighting/mood: heroic, trustworthy, polished warm highlights
Color palette: silver armor, red cape, crown gold accents, deep indigo shadows
Constraints: premium Japanese anime mobile game style, clean line art, polished cel shading, no text, no watermark, no logo, no modern items, non-explicit design

skill.name: 夜鸦窥价
skill.short_effect: 每轮开始前自动翻开2个随机未公开道具的类型或品质提示，每局最多触发3轮。

skill.name: 星盘估值
skill.short_effect: 每局2次，在竞拍窗口内获得当前仓库总估值区间提示。

skill.name: 圣铃缓付
skill.short_effect: 每局1次，成交时先支付85%，剩余15%从结算收益中抵扣。

skill.name: 黑蔷薇威压
skill.short_effect: 每局1次，本轮所有对手的下一次有效加价额外提高1个min_raise。

ui_assets.prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: 16:9 game UI background, 2048x1152
Primary request: medieval fantasy royal auction hall background for an auction strategy game
Scene/backdrop: deep wooden auction table in foreground, arched windows, chandeliers, velvet curtains, stone pillars, golden auction hammer, magical projection of treasure crates in the center
Composition/framing: wide UI-safe composition, central area darker and less detailed for interface overlays, decorative detail around edges, no characters
Lighting/mood: luxurious, strategic, warm gold light mixed with deep indigo shadows
Color palette: deep indigo, crown gold, dark wood, parchment highlights, jewel teal magical glow
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no logo, no modern objects, readable for UI overlay

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: square or 4:3 game board background for item grid
Primary request: medieval fantasy warehouse loot grid background
Scene/backdrop: carved stone slab and parchment auction inventory board, faint 8x8 grid impression, metallic corners, gem rarity markers, subtle magical dust
Composition/framing: clean center, high readability, edges decorated with brass and wax seal motifs, no actual readable text
Lighting/mood: mysterious treasure appraisal, practical and readable
Color palette: stone gray, parchment cream, antique gold, jewel teal, wine red accents
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no logo, no modern objects

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: 16:9 settlement screen background
Primary request: medieval fantasy auction settlement contract background
Scene/backdrop: parchment contract on dark wood table, wax seal, coin piles, crown emblem, small auction hammer, subtle magical accounting glow
Composition/framing: central parchment area clean for score panels, decorative items at corners, no characters
Lighting/mood: satisfying, premium, decisive end-of-round result
Color palette: parchment cream, crown gold, dark wood, wine red wax, deep indigo shadow
Constraints: no readable text, no watermark, no logo, no modern objects

Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: game UI control style sheet concept image
Primary request: unified medieval fantasy auction UI controls, showing button, input field, panel, avatar frame, item cell, timer bar, tooltip bubble, rarity corner marker
Style/medium: polished 2D game UI concept art, high readability, not a screenshot of a complete app
Composition/framing: arranged neatly on a neutral deep indigo background, each component visually separate, no labels or text
Lighting/mood: premium fantasy auction, metal bevels, parchment surfaces, jewel teal active glow, crown gold accents
Color palette: deep indigo, crown gold, parchment, jewel teal, wine red
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no logo, avoid clutter, practical for Godot UI slicing
